state_gate.publish_partial: guide disposition == partial-use and caveat class has explicit safe payload
state_gate.internal_only: fields flagged internal-only or guides with no safe payload (none currently)

standard_path_list.conditions: sp_status in {usable, partial with explicit label}

standard_path_term.conditions: if any term is non-null; else render ordered list without terms

competency_bullets.conditions: publish except known empty-list courses; collapse by default in UI

capstone.conditions: publish if present; include caveat flag for MEDETID

version_pub_metadata.conditions: publish when present; omission is acceptable

cert_prep_mentions.conditions: currently inline text only; no stable structured extractor yet

degree_structure_context.conditions: derived from AoS groups + SP availability flags

public_claim_boundary: Allowed: Atlas has complete extraction artifacts for 115 guides with documented caveats.
Allowed: Atlas can publish guide-derived degree structure where source quality supports it.
Disallowed: Atlas already surfaces all guide-derived data live.
Disallowed: all guide-derived fields are equally reliable.
deferred_to_later: Course-page enrichment via course-code matching (Phase E).
Family-specific specialty sections beyond core AoS/SP/capstone payload.

allow: AoS competency bullets (except one known empty)
BSITM.ui_caveat: Show generic note: "Program map shown from Areas of Study; standard sequence unavailable from source guide formatting."

MATSPED.ui_caveat: Same student-facing caveat as BSITM (sequence unavailable).

MSCSUG.ui_caveat: Same student-facing caveat as BSITM (sequence unavailable).

disallow: Any claim that SP covers full program
BSPRN.ui_caveat: Show explicit label: "Pre-Nursing Standard Path" and a short note that nursing-track sequencing is AoS-only.

allow: capstone title and first sequence entry
disallow: Any claim that capstone extraction is complete for all 3 sequence courses
MEDETID.ui_caveat: Optional subtle note in capstone block only; do not block publication.

BSNU.ui_caveat: No required user-facing caveat; treat missing metadata as silent omission.
